description: Synthetic HL7 v2.3 ORU^R01 CBC result from a RAYTO RAC-050 carrying analyzer-native (local, 99RAC) observation codes and raw vendor units — the input the tolerant ORU^R01 parser + LOINC/UCUM normalization (LIS-14 / S1.2) maps to a normalized intermediate row. NOT a real instrument capture.

source.note: Application payload only. Uses local 99RAC observation codes (HGB/HCT/WBC/PLT) and raw vendor units so normalization is non-trivial (e.g. 10^9/L -> UCUM 10*9/L). A real RAYTO RAC-050 capture replaces this in LIS-20 (bench conformance): set synthetic:false with a capture reference.
